name: Lima Beans W/Chile &Seed
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the sunflower seeds in a pan until they are lightly golden.
2. Add the chopped onion and cook until it becomes translucent.
3. Add the chopped tomato and jalapeno to the pan. Cook until all ingredients are well combined.
4. Stir in the lima beans and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the beans are heated through.
5. Sprinkle the chopped cilantro over the mixture and serve.
